==Chinese==
{{zh-forms|alt=丞,抍,𢮋}}

===Glyph origin===
{{Han etym}}
{{Han compound|手|丞|ls=ic|ls2=psc|c1=s|c2=p}}.

===Etymology===
From {{inh|zh|sit-pro|*tVŋ||upper part; to rise; to raise}}. Related to {{och-l|承|to receive}}, {{och-l|烝|id=1|to offer (gifts, sacrifices, etc.)}}, {{och-l|登|to mount; to rise}}, {{och-l|升|to rise}} ({{zh-ref|Schuessler, 2007}}; {{zh-ref|Sagart and Baxter, 2012}}).

===Definitions===
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# to [[rescue]]; to [[save]]; to [[aid]]
#* {{zh-x|勿 導 入 試、拯 我 出 惡|And lead us not into temptation, but '''deliver''' us from evil|CL-L|ref={{lang|zh|文理和合譯本}}, {{lang|zh|馬太福音}} [Matthew] 6:13}}
# {{lb|zh|literary}} to [[lift]]; to [[raise]]
